title: Patina
description: A datapack adding copper tools and armor with a small twist as well as a laser weapon
body:
This datapack changes how copper gear behaves by allowing them to oxidize as well as becoming waxable to prevent oxidization. Also, with the pack comes the Copper Crossbow and Amethyst Cartridges that lets you fire lasers along with brand new advancements!

## Oxidization
When copper tools and armor are placed inside item frames or held in the main/offhand they'll oxidize slowly, changing texture and increasing their maximum durability. Copper armor pieces can also oxidize while equipped by a player or being displayed on an armor stand.

Oxidization isn't a permanent thing as any copper tool can be scraped with a piece of flint to slowly reverse the process.

Once fully oxidized, these items will gain an enchantment as a reward for your patience:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Sword**: Looting I
- **Axe**: Sharpness II
- **Pickaxe**: Silk Touch
- **Shovel**: Efficiency I
- **Hoe**: Unbreaking I
- **Crossbow**: Quick Charge I
- **Brush**: Unbreaking I
- **Helmet**: Aqua Affinity
- **Chestplate**: Thorns I
- **Leggings**: Protection I
- **Boots**: Feather Falling I
- **Horse Armor**: Gallop I

</details>



Copper pickaxe is a special case, as it fully oxidizes, it'll obtain the ability to mine and obtain Budding Amethyst blocks.

## Waxing
You can prevent further oxidation by dropping a honeycomb and the tool on the ground to coat it with wax. If you ever want to remove this wax from your copper tool, simply drop the tool and a piece of flint on the ground to scrape it off completely.

## Amethyst Cartridge
Two new craftable items are added. One is the Copper Crossbow which functions identically to a normal Crossbow but with slightly more durability.

![Crafting Recipe for the Copper Crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c457e23ccd696cfd59116773c7d809604598543.png)
![Crafting recipe for the Amethyst Cartridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10edad64eb17780ed7219a6f932d50898ea02a8b.png)

The other is the Amethyst Cartridge which is a new item that can be charged with experience points by dropping it onto a Lodestone. After a total of 12 levels consumed, the Amethyst Cartridge will become fully charged. When loaded into a Copper Crossbow, it can fire a high-power laser that deals 12 hearts of damage.

## Advancements
There is also a new category of advancements, focusing primarily on teaching you and your friends how to use the datapack. I have also included one hidden advancement, so keep an eye out.

## Commands
 The settings and fixes menu can be opened by typing in the following command: /function patina_copper:settings

## Installation
Unzip the downloaded file to access the datapack and resourcepack. The pack.mcmeta is not real, it's just a figment of your imagination
